documents.title: Ethics Agreement (Amended)
documents.summary: Sets ethics requirements for Deputy Secretary of State including recusal from matters involving former law firm clients and specific divestiture commitments.

documents.title: Nominee Form 278
documents.summary: Comprehensive financial disclosure for State Department nominee including substantial law practice income, diverse securities portfolio, and real estate holdings.
